name: jihan-agents
description: Role-based agent suite for documentation lifecycle. Bundles notion-writer (authoring), verifier-on-sandbox (CLI command verification in disposable Ubuntu Docker), notion-doc-verifier (end-to-end Notion doc QA orchestrator), notion-verifier-gui (public URL + UI label checks), and notion-verifier-concept (prose review for dead links, missing steps, factual drift). Ships with general-doc-rules and method-doc-rules skills.
